commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper verdict: pass (sha=7ebf5820dc9da6a85eff1679ccfcf2371e325966); PR is behind or has merge conflicts and needs a cloud rebase repair before automerge
commands.review_summary:
The branch clears a rejected cached CLI config snapshot promise, adds a regression test for reject-to-retry-to-cache behavior, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main stores the first snapshot-read promise at `src/cli/program/config-guard.ts:33`, so a rejected read is returned again until process restart. The source PR also supplied a reject, recover, cached-success runtime probe, though I did not rerun it in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed; the automerge-opted PR has no actionable review findings and should proceed through required exact-head CI and mergeability gates.

target.title: fix: retry config snapshot after rejection
target.body:
Makes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/83931 merge-ready for the ClawSweeper automerge loop.
The edit pass should inspect the live PR diff, review comments, and failing checks; rebase if needed; keep the contributor branch credited; and stop only when validation is green or an external blocker is proven.
